name: io.github.razee4315/netlogo-mcp
title: NetLogo MCP
description: Create, run, and analyze NetLogo agent-based models through natural conversation

environmentVariables.name: NETLOGO_HOME
environmentVariables.description: Path to the NetLogo 7.0+ installation directory (e.g. C:/Program Files/NetLogo 7.0.3)

environmentVariables.name: JAVA_HOME
environmentVariables.description: Path to a Java JDK 11+ installation (not a JRE)

environmentVariables.name: NETLOGO_GUI
environmentVariables.description: Set to false for headless mode (no NetLogo window); default true
